feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to configure OKTA as Identity Authentication for Embedded Analytics( SAP Incentive Compensation)
entry.content:
Need some insight on how to configure OKTA as Identity Authentication for Embedded Analytics, using the following blog post - https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/connect-okta-to-identity-authentication/ba-p/13468665, ), when tried to use OKTA identity provider as conditional authentication it says user not present contact administrator.

SAP Incentive Management SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics

entry.title: Embedded Analytics - SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

I am trying to create a custom Story dashboard in Manage KPIs and Reports Fiori application using Embedded Analytics cloud features in SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition.

However, I am facing an issue during the configuration. While embedding the SAC story, I encounter an error please refer to the attached screenshot for details. 

I would appreciate it if you could guide me on how to resolve the above error and design dashboard.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Function Union ALL for CDS VIEW in SAP S4HANA Public CLoud
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Am working on CDS view in S4HANA Public cloud, and am wondering how to do 'UNION ALL' Function, since the system with CDS view it only allows to choose key fields for associations and cardinality , 

NB : I dont have access to ABAP environement .

Thank you .

entry.title: in S4HCloud - Query Browser app missing
entry.content:
in S4HCloud 2508 I don't find the Query Browser (not in any space, not in the app finder).

I included many roles already, as shown below, but still I don't have the App "Query Browser" in our development tenant. (Though I see the app now in the customizing tenant, where also the roles are assigned. All other roles are automatically valid for both tenants/clients - but not in the case of "QueryBrowser")

I added already many roles as described in a former post from 2018/2024, but it does not change anything.

*BR_ANALYTICS_SPECIALIST 
*BR_EMPLOYEE 
*BR_ADMINISTRATOR 
*BR_DEVELOPER 

Meanwhile I  added the by @dawid90  mentioned roles resp. the catalogs from the blog he mentioned, but it only helped to have the app in the customizing tenant, not in the development tenant.
I don't know if this split is unusual, I guess not.

Other colleagues with only role *BR_DEVELOPER  do have access/find it.

Any ideas? Thanks!

entry.title: Combined Chart Column & Line with different dimentions on s4 hana analytical report
entry.content:
Hi all, Im a developer, not a bi/bw expert

i've created a Cube and a Query on S4hana, after that i've created an analytical report with some graphics and it is working well. ( Using app manage KPI and Reports )

My requirement is to have a combined chart, Collum and Line, but the line is just to have the total, so different dimentions :

So Columns are PLANT/DATE. Line shoud be only DATE ( to display the total )

Currently when im creating the combined it displays Column and Line, but with same values

 

What i need is only 1 line with total. Is it possible to create such graphic on Analytical list page?

current graphic configuration

S4 Hana 2025 ( we dont have SAC )

entry.title: Embedded Analytics - Custom Cube for Margin Analysis - Calculated Key Figure shows no data
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

let me give you some additional information before explaining the issue.

Back in R/3 we used KE35 (Form) and KER1 (Key Figure Scheme) to prepare for KE30 (Profitability Report) in SAP CO-PA modul.

So far i have done significant tests only with transient view entity … analytical query and was able to replace our custom reports from R/3 costing based COPA to S/4 Margin Analysis queries and the results are very good.

However, i noticed that using a custom consumption view offers very little reuseability. A new requirement triggers a new consumption view and copy/paste of the CDS view. So i want to achieve REUSEABILITY for restricted measures and calculated measures. Looking at the SAP VDM i think it is time to build custom cubes, which i successfully circumvented so far.

So how can i replace R/3 „Forms“, „Key Figures Schemes“ and „Reports“ with Embedded Analytics? I am trying to do a crossover to the VDM which uses cubes, querys, restricted measures, and calculated measures. (Screenshot shows R/3 setup of CO-PA reporting)

 

 

I am not trying to replicate the old world 1 by 1, but take over what is still useful e.g. „Prepare a Form“ and „Prepare Key Figures“ and reuse this in multiple querys.

I created the above „custom VDM“ and while the values of the restricted measures are shown correct (see below, RSRT) in the consumption view, the calcuated measures are always inital. What am i doing wrong?

Formulas are very simple:

Revenue - COGS = ContributionMargin1 and FIDirect - OverhAlloc = FIMinusOverhead

My guess is that the calculated measures may have lost their dimensions? Could that be the reason?

Or do i not understand how aggregation works?

Greatful for any tipps. I can share the CDS Views if needed.

Thank you

Regards

David

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud: Custom Analytical Queries And Services; export no longer possible?
entry.content:
In the lastest Public Cloud update (SAP S/4HANA CLOUD 2602) the new "Custom Analytical Queries And Services" app was introduced for the creation of analytical queries and services. The former "Custom Analytical Queries" app is still available, but one is no longer able to create new queries. 

The problem with new app I am currently facing is that there seems to be no export functionality anymore. Previously it was fairly easy to export the resultset of my query to Excel oder CSV but this functionality is no longer available.

Do you know any workarounds how I get my query exported?

Thank you very much!

entry.title: How to pass longtext via extraction enable CDS to Datasphere
entry.content:
I need to pass longtext in datasphere using extraction enabled CDS. However, neither longtext nor table functions can be used for it.
Could you please to identify the best way to do it.

Regards,
Malika Bathla.

SAP Datasphere SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Standard date format issue in Smart Business KPI report
entry.content:
Hi All,

we're facing an issue with Date-Display for CDS-Based Queries in Smart Business KPIs. The date values are not displayed according to user settings (for example dd.mm.yyyy). Instead, the KPI report shows dates in internal format yyyymmdd. Standard format is not working dd.mm.yyyy (yyyymmdd) .

  • In the KPI report (Manage KPIs and Reports), all date fields display as yyyymmdd.
  • The expected behavior is that dates should follow the user’s regional/date settings (e.g., dd.mm.yyyy(yyyymmdd)).

  • In the OData service response, the date dimension contains two fields:

    • PlannedGoodsIssueDate
    • PlannedGoodsIssueDate_T

  • We are not explicitly defining any _T fields in our CDS views, but the _T field still appears in OData.

  • The OData service is using standard generic analytics runtime classes:

    • MPC: CL_NAT_GENERIC_MPC
    • DPC: CL_NAT_GENERIC_DPC

  • When I inspect the Fiori KPI app network calls, the GET request uses $select, but it does not include:

    • PlannedGoodsIssueDate_T

    So the KPI report only fetches PlannedGoodsIssueDate and the _T field never reaches the UI.

 

  1. What is the recommended way to ensure date fields are displayed in the user’s date format in KPI tiles?
  2. Is there any known configuration / best practice / SAP note to address this issue?

Any guidance would be appreciated.

Thanks in advance,

PA

entry.title: Leading zeros in CDS parameter lost during INA request processing in Analytical Query
entry.content:
In an Analytical Projection View (#ANALYTICAL_QUERY), I have a parameter of type NUMC(15).
When I send a parameter like 000000000000001 via an INA Service GetResponse request, the zeros are stripped and the query does not return results (and I need to send it with zeros)
I cannot use expressions like LPAD() in the projection parameter, and changing the parameter to CHAR15 does not solve the problem.
How can I ensure that the INA request correctly handles leading zeros so the projection view returns results from the database?

Here is the part of the body in the GetResponse request where I send the parameters:
"Variables": [
{
"Name": "!CDS_P_***",
"Values": {
"Selection": {
"SetOperand": {
"Elements": [
{
"key": 3285,
"Low": "000000000000001",
"IsExcluding": false,
"LowSupplements": [
"Version 1"
],
"Description": "***",
"tokenText": "***"
}
],
"FieldName": "***"
}
}
}
}
]

entry.title: How to get body for InA Service Request without cloud tools
entry.content:
Hello, I am exploring possibilities of the new CDS Projection Views, specifically the Analytical Query, but the important thing to mention is that I'm on prem.
And as the Analytical Projection Views can only be accessed via InA Services, I cannot really make the GetResponse request to work and return data (The main issue is the Parameters (Variables in InA Request) that I need to pass)

So I would like to know if there is a way to get the request for this specific Analytical Query ON PREM.

entry.title: Can we use embbedded BW data as a CDS view for embedded Analytics.
entry.content:
Dear members,

is it possible to use embedded BW data as a source CDS for embedded analytics.

I would like to get the wagetypes and values and eployee data as a table and use it as a source CDS. ( 0HR_PY_1 datasource)

We use an on-premises system.

Thanks for answering.

entry.title: App for Custom Analytical Queries (F1572) – Create Local Queries in the Production Environment
entry.content:
Hi, 

is there a option to develop via Fiori APP directly in the productive environment an cds view? 

"App for Custom Analytical Queries (F1572)"

May via ATO configuration? 

 

thanks a lot for any ideas ?

regards

Simon

entry.title: SAC: Data not refreshed by refresh button/auto refresh - No "Live Data" possible?
entry.content:
Dear all,

 

We are facing the following problem:
Data in SAC dashboard are not refreshed when using the standard refresh button or scripts like Application.refreshData().
We need to reopen the browser page in order to get the latest set of data. 

Setup: 
Dashboard -> CDS VM -> S/4HANA Tables

Caching is already disabled in RSRT: 3384063 - Refresh button from SAP Analytics Cloud Story does not update the data for BW live data connection - SAP for Me

May I ask you for any ideas how real "Live Data" could be achieved? 
In the final solution we would like to use the auto refresh function in SAC with an interval of a few minutes.

Thank you

entry.title: Display Hierarchy in SAP RAP
entry.content:
ABAP Development  ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model  #ABAPCloud

We are trying to create a UI app with

1. WBS hierarchy tree on first page.

2. On click of a selected WBS it would go to another page which has financial details in form of single table having multiple tab views.

Can anyone please help with any of these requirements? How can we use analytical cube and query to achieve this?

entry.title: SAP S4Hana Public Cloud - Custom Analytical Queries and Services, Default to Previous Month?
entry.content: In the old App "Custom Analytical Queries", I am able to set a date filter with a Default Value of "relative: Previous Month". How do I do this in the new "Custom Analytical Queries and Services" App?

entry.title: Can we please use the 'old' Custom Analytical Queries App to create new Queries again?
entry.content:
One problem I see is that SAP has two apps. One named "Custom Analytical Queries" and another one named "Custom Analytical Queries and Services". Within "Custom Analytical Queries", you can no-longer create new Queries. The issue is that "Custom Analytical Queries and Services" does not have the Aggregation options for some of the elements.

I keep running into situations where the older app would have worked better for me and the new app, keeps missing features. 

Is there a way to turn the old one 'back on' until the new app has more functionality that I miss from the old?

entry.title: Description Blank for Value Help on Parameter in Analytical Query
entry.content:
Hi, I have a problem with displaying the description (text) in WEBDYNPRO View Browser app, where I'm using an Analytical Query view (view using the @analytics.query: true annotation) and there I have a parameter that is using the @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition for a VH view, combined with the additionalBinding property everything works fine except the description for the data appear blank.

I have tried with @ObjectModel.text.association: '' and @ObjectModel.text.element: [ '' ] annotations, and using hidden parameters and trying to send them to the VH view, but none of it seemed to work.

Did anyone have a similar problem or have an idea on how to make this work?

entry.title: How to consume InA Services in SAP Fiori UI's on S/4HANA Cloud Private/ Public Edition?
entry.content:
Hi folks,

Following is the screenshot taken from ABAP Analytics documentation, where SAP mentions that SAP Fiori UI's can be the consumer of InA Services.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

But, I am not able to find any relevant blogs/ documentation explaining the same in brief/ in detail.

Can you provide your knowledge on the same topic in the context of S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to Link Two Analytical Queries in Embedded SAC App? "A linked dimension" Error
entry.content:
How to Link Two Analytical Queries in Embedded SAC App?
"A linked dimension for this model is not included in the visualization's dimension bindings" Error

I am creating an Embedded SAC Application in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and trying to link two Analytical Queries using Company Code. Both Company Code fields have the same data type, semantics, and values, and the link is created successfully.

However, the widget shows the error:

"A linked dimension for this model is not included in the visualization's dimension bindings."

How can I correctly connect/link these two queries? Is there any additional configuration required for linked dimensions or dimension bindings?
